titleStmt.title: SII 31.252: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 252. (A.R. No. B 317 of 1937.) ŌLĒRU, REPALLE TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in front of the elementary school.
It is dated in Śaka 1785, Kali 4264, Duṁdubhi, Vaiśākha, śu. 15, Tuesday, svāti, corresponding to 1863 A.D., June 22.

States that a merchant Koṇḍappaseṭṭi, the resident of Chennapaṭṭna (present Chennai) purchased a plot of land along with a well in the Śaka year Raudri, Adhika Jyēshṭha, ba. 10, Thursday equivalent to 1850 A.D. October and got constructed a Choultry in the same place. It is handed over to one Kākumānu Vīraṁnnabaṭṭu, the resident of Kolluru of Krishna District for the use of the Brahmins, Kshatriya and Vaisya and the other pilgrims, who are coming from the pilgrims centers like Kāśi and Rāmēśvaram. It further states that this gift should not be sold out by the donor or his succesor or kinsmen. If any body violates the rule, the government should order for the restoration of the said gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīUmāmahēśvara sahāyaṁ
svastiśrī . vijayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1785 kali varṣaṁbulu 46
64 prabhavādi gatavarṣaṁbulu 55 parivartamāna
vyapahārika duṁdubhināma saṁvvatsara vaiśākha śu
kla 15 Aṁgārakavāramu svātīnakṣamu siddha
yōgamugala yī śubhadinamaṁddu dhanurla
gnamulō kaḍapa jillā prādduṭūru kāpurastu
luṁnnu vaiśyakulōdbhavuluṁnnū punagaśala gō
tōddhārakuluṁnnuyina kāmiśeṭṭisiṁgayya
śēṭṭivāri pautnaluṁnnū panappaśeṭṭivāri putṛ
luṁnu prastutaṁ rājathāniyagu cannapaṭṇamu
saṁdu vasiyiṁcci yuṁḍē koṁḍappaśeṭlu pratiṣṭhiṁci
na tharmapatraśilāśāsanamu yēmaṁṭēśrīmadakhila
bhūmaṁḍala maṁḍanaṁbu guṁṭūru jillā rēpa
lle tālukālōcērisa vūlērulō Aṁkkarāju
rāmacaṁdṛḍu veṁkannasthalamuku paḍamaravēmu
lapalli gōpaṁna vagairāla sthalamuku vuttaraṁ Aṁ
karāju veṁkappa sōmaṁnasametu poraṁbōka ḍoṁka
ku tūrpurastā ḍoṁkaku dakṣaṇaṁ Īmadhyanuṁ
ḍe stalamu bhāviṁnni 1860 saṁvvatsaraṁ Aguṭōbaru
runela tēdiki sariAyni raudrināma saṁvatsaraṁ
Athika Āśvija bahuḷa 10 beyavāramunāḍu kṛ
ṣṇā ḍisṭrikṭu tenāli tālukālō cērna kollūru
kāparastuḍaina kākumānu vīraṁnnabattuni vadda putra
pautrapāraṁparyamugā Anubhavayōgyamērānaṭlu
śuddhakrayaṁ cēsukuni sadarustalamu lō satramu
kaṭṭiṁcci śrīrmaṁbraṁhmamukha saṁbhavulunnu ca
turu vēdāti sakalaśāstrādikāruluṁnnu kāśi
rāmēśvarādi puṇyakṣētrāyātralaku bōvuvā
ruṁnnu vaccuvāruṁnnu bāṭasāruluṁnnu A
ynabrahmakṣatravaiśyōttamulakē mukhyamu
gānupayōga baḍunaṭlu śrīmadbhagava tharmmasamuṁ
tamugā saṁkkalpiṁccipratiṣṭhaṁccina dharmasa
tramunaku yī śilāśāsanamu stāpiṁpa ba
ḍinadi mariṁnni nākugāni nāmukhyavārasulaku gā
ni yavarikēgāni dharmapālana ceyyaḍamukētappa dā
na dharmmana vikrayamulaku Aruhalamukāmukā
lāṁttarēṇa yavarainā bādhyulamanivacci dharmeno
ttuApahariṁcceyeḍala sadaru grāmasthuluṁnnu
sarkāruvāruṁnnu Ākṣēpiṁcci dharmamusūrya caṁ
drādulu vuṁḍēvaraku jarigiṁdharma prabuvulu viśēṣa
maina phalamunu jeṁdduduru śrīmadvaṁśajāḥ paramahī
pati vaṁśajāvāḥ yēbhūmipāḥ satatamudvalu dharma
tāḥ yaddharmamēva satataṁ paripālayaṁti tatpā
duka dvayamahaṁ sirasānnamāmi .
Digital edition of SII 31.252 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
